---
title: "Open-Source Flight Control Systems"
id: material-hs-2
order: 44
summary: "David Such gives a comprehensive overview of the variety of open-source flight control systems."
source_url: "https://reefwing.medium.com/a-review-of-open-source-flight-control-systems-2fe37239c9b6"
modules:
  - module-introduction
  - module-hs
Goals:
  - module-goals
  - module-goals-hs
activities: []
assessments:
  - assessment
  - assessment-hs
labels:
  - supplement
  - optional
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/Hardware_Software/material-hs-2.md"
---

Read the article:

<https://reefwing.medium.com/a-review-of-open-source-flight-control-systems-2fe37239c9b6>

## Connected Module

- [UAV based remote Sensing - A Brief Overview](../modules/module-introduction.qmd)
- [Scientific UAV Hardware](../modules/module-hs.qmd)
